name: MAC-10 | 棕榈色
collection: 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: Essentially a box that bullets come out of, the MAC-10 SMG boasts a high rate of fire, with poor spread accuracy and high recoil as trade-offs. It has been spray-painted using cardboard cutouts, fine mesh, and palm leaves as stencils.
descriptionZh: 本质上就是个能射出子弹的盒子，MAC-10 微型冲锋枪拥有高频率的射速，作为交换，它还拥有略逊一筹的精准度和高后坐力。 这把武器以纸板切口、细网格和棕榈叶为漏字板进行了喷漆。
